nl_query: Which configurations at course scope override the global scope setting for the same configuration key, and show the course code, global value, course value, and the data type.
failed_sql:
SELECT c.id, c.config_key, c.config_value, c.data_type, c.description, au.code AS academic_unit_code, g.global_value, au_value, g.data_type AS global_data_type
FROM   configuration c
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = c.scope_id AND c.scope_type = 'COURSE'
JOIN   configuration g ON g.config_key = c.config_key AND g.scope_type = 'GLOBAL'
WHERE  g.scope_id IS NULL
  AND  au_value <> g.global_value
ORDER  BY au.code, c.config_key;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): configuration.global_value, academic_unit.au_value, academic_unit.au_value, configuration.global_value. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
